Based on the detailed explanation provided earlier, I largely concur with the assessment given by agent1. However, adding nuance specifically around option A might help clarify further. 

The primary point remains valid—that while cephalosporins may exhibit varying degrees of cross-sensitivity with different penicillins, stating that “all” cephalosporins universally display high levels of cross-sensitivity would oversimplify reality.
